'''zhayufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherdom|featherdom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherdom|featherdom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhayufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæyifith|zhæyifith]] || [[word:zhæyifij|zhæyifij]] || [[word:zhæyifish|zhæyifish]] || [[word:zhæyifi|zhæyifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhayuyufuth|zhayuyufuth]] || [[word:zhayuyufuj|zhayuyufuj]] || [[word:zhayuyufush|zhayuyufush]] || [[word:zhayuyufu|zhayuyufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhayufuth|zhayufuth]] || [[word:zhayufuj|zhayufuj]] || [[word:zhayufush|zhayufush]] || [[word:zhayufu|zhayufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhayuffuth|zhayuffuth]] || [[word:zhayuffuj|zhayuffuj]] || [[word:zhayuffush|zhayuffush]] || [[word:zhayuffuf|zhayuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhayufuthu|zhayufuthu]] || [[word:zhayufuju|zhayufuju]] || [[word:zhayufushu|zhayufushu]] || [[word:zhayufuku|zhayufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhayufuth|zhayufuth]] || [[word:zhayufuj|zhayufuj]] || [[word:zhayufush|zhayufush]] || [[word:zhayufu|zhayufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhayufuthul|zhayufuthul]] || [[word:zhayufujul|zhayufujul]] || [[word:zhayufushul|zhayufushul]] || [[word:zhayufukul|zhayufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhayufuthuthu|zhayufuthuthu]] || [[word:zhayufujuju|zhayufujuju]] || [[word:zhayufushushu|zhayufushushu]] || [[word:zhayufuku|zhayufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhayufuthun|zhayufuthun]] || [[word:zhayufujun|zhayufujun]] || [[word:zhayufushun|zhayufushun]] || [[word:zhayufukun|zhayufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhayufuthuoro|zhayufuthuoro]] || [[word:zhayufujuoro|zhayufujuoro]] || [[word:zhayufushuoro|zhayufushuoro]] || [[word:zhayufukuoro|zhayufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
